_meta.note: Source of truth for apps/labs_slides_src.html (the business-applications closer deck). Every entry pins a number or quote EXACTLY as printed at source_url on the retrieval date; the build substitutes {{labs.key}} tokens from `text` and verify_labs_deck.py re-checks presence on the slides. This file plays the role the notebook shards play for the other two decks: numbers are never typed into the template. Quotes carry the page's own typography (en-dashes in ranges, R-squared as the superscript glyph, spaced commas) except where a slide must drop an em-dash per the deck grammar; claims then check the dash-free fragments. 2026-07-21: ten pins removed with the cut to three examples (Bolt validation/honesty quote, streaming-service scale, do-operator wedge, HF inference-speedup + TV anecdote); recover them from git history if those cases return.

labs.market.quote: Providing these business insights is enormously valuable for making product development decisions in a global market estimated at $20.8 billion in 2023.

labs.colgate_year.quote: Back in 2023, Colgate-Palmolive approached us with exactly these questions.

labs.colgate_truth.quote: In our simulation we made it such that there was 50% incrementality and 50% cannibalization

labs.colgate_ci.quote: The model's parameter estimate (right) shows a very reasonable estimate - 94% credible intervals from 49-59%.

labs.fail_range.quote: What actually happened was your product was 100% incremental, but the model's estimate falls quite far short of this, estimating somewhere between 64-76% incrementality.

labs.fail_truth.quote: What actually happened was your product was 100% incremental

labs.colgate_counterfactual_quote.text: estimate the counterfactual sales of all products would have been if the new product had not been introduced
labs.colgate_counterfactual_quote.quote: More specifically, we need to estimate the counterfactual sales of all products would have been if the new product had not been introduced.

labs.roas_gap_words.quote: x2 is nearly twice as effective as x1.

labs.roas_wrong_ranking.text: the direct opposite of the truth
labs.roas_wrong_ranking.quote: In this example, the baseline model suggested x1 was more effective than x2 [em-dash on page] the direct opposite of the truth.

labs.lift_tests_n.quote: After adding two lift tests per channel, the model recovers ROAS estimates very close to the true values: 93.39 for x1 and 171.41 for x2

labs.hf_var.quote: The outcome? Predictions aligned much more closely with reality, cutting variance by 60%.

labs.hf_priors_experiments.quote: Another source of prior knowledge could be the results of carefully conducted field experiments such as lift or incrementality tests.

labs.hf_panel_calibration.text: calibrated to ensure consistency with incrementality measurements
labs.hf_panel_calibration.quote: [17:14] Bayesian MMM can be calibrated to ensure consistency with incrementality measurements (panel-discussion agenda entry)

labs.bolt_pr.quote: Bolt contributed back by opening a pull request to add their budget allocation approach to PyMC-Marketing, ensuring other teams could benefit from the same advances.

labs.cpl.quote: "This year we were able to drive the CPL down by more than 27%, which is very, very good." - Philip Herp, Nürnberger Versicherung

labs.cpl_window.quote: From June through November, Nürnberger used the model's budget allocation recommendations to guide their digital spend.

labs.herp_attribution_quote.text: attribution mechanics instead of incremental business impact
labs.herp_attribution_quote.quote: We were optimizing for attribution mechanics instead of incremental business impact. (Philip Herp)

labs.trust_quote.text: Trust is not created by R² values. It is created when business reality matches model expectations.
labs.trust_quote.quote: Trust is not created by R² values. It is created when business reality matches model expectations. (blockquote, introduced by 'As Philip notes:')

labs.gdpr_sentence.quote: But with GDPR and increasing tracking restrictions, customer journeys appeared artificially shortened, upper- and mid-funnel channels became partially invisible, and channel contribution was biased toward bottom-funnel performance.

labs.nurn_2026.quote: Nürnberger is scaling the model into full production for 2026, expanding the channel set and deepening the funnel structure.

labs.hf_batch.quote: Refactoring the computation into one large unpooled model to fit all datasets simultaneously reduced batch runtime from 5–6 hours to 5–6 minutes. (en-dashes as printed)

labs.hf_thousands.quote: HelloFresh needed a scalable, trustworthy Bayesian A/B testing pipeline that could handle thousands of concurrent tests efficiently.

labs.hf_test_types.quote: A company at HelloFresh's scale runs a large number of A/B, ABC, and ABCD test campaigns simultaneously. (separate sentence from the 'thousands' claim; do not merge into one quoted claim)

labs.criteo_rows.quote: Rows: 13,979,592 (Criteo Uplift Prediction Dataset v2.1; the dataset behind this afternoon's real-data act)

labs.causalpy_methods.text: synthetic control, interrupted time series, difference in differences, and regression discontinuity
labs.causalpy_methods.quote: Four quasi-experimental methods are supported: synthetic control, interrupted time series, difference in differences, and regression discontinuity. (the launch post does NOT mention IV; CausalPy's IV estimator, used in this course's notebooks, came later)

labs.causalpy_tv.quote: TV advertising: Individual exposure to a linear TV campaign cannot be randomised. Yet understanding the causal impact of that campaign on customer behaviour remains a core business need.

labs.webinar_agenda.quote: Timestamps agenda entries: 06:49 Geo-Experimentation; 16:24 MMM Structure; 31:14 Causal Inference (Synthetic control); 32:10 Causal Inference (Difference-in-Differences and Regression Discontinuity); 32:39 Instrumental Variables (separate agenda entries, compiled here)

labs.dl_verdict.text: No valid model found. Run a geo-holdout experiment.
labs.dl_verdict.quote: Explored 11 approaches, 0 converged. Returned: "No valid model found. Run a geo-holdout experiment." (Decision Lab result cell, benchmark table, adversarial MMM dataset)
